summary: Iteration 3 e2e validation of v0.3 upgrades (OpenAI TTS, Live ECG, Dynamic Tour Engine, drag-drop pathway quizzes, expanded brain/heart tours). Backend 16/16 pytest passing (8 new TTS tests + 8 regression). Frontend: ECG monitor with WebAudio, Tour Player with traveling particles + 'Did you know?' facts + auto-play TTS, all 5 brain tours, both pathway quizzes, and narrator button placement all working end-to-end. No critical bugs found.

minor.issue: Server sets `Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400` but the Cloudflare/preview proxy overrides it to `no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate`, so client-side MP3 caching never activates in this environment. Functionally harmless (browser will still buffer), but the explicit cache directive is being silently dropped.

Observed one transient 502 (LLM gateway flake) during the first run; retry succeeded. Recommend adding a single internal retry on emergentintegrations transient errors so users don't see 502 on first chat turn.

integration_issues.issue: Selector-level: green/red highlighting works visually (verified in screenshot — 'Lungs' row tinted green with check icon, mismatched rows red with '→ was: …' hint) but the classes used are tailwind utility classes that won't match a generic [class*='green'] CSS selector. Recommend adding `data-correct='true|false'` or `data-state='correct|incorrect'` on the pathway item rows after submit for easier test assertion.

issues: Tour spec says 'animated purple particles' for brain tours, but the particles render with the same pink/rose color as heart tours (see screenshot of Speech Pathway tour). Consider per-organ particle tint (purple for brain, pink for heart) so the visual identity matches the spec.

The Tour Player narrator 'Listen' button shows a 'Loading…' label until the TTS MP3 fetches; on slow networks this lingers. Optional: add a short skeleton/spinner inside the button instead of plain text.

action_items: (Optional polish) Add data-state attribute to pathway-item rows after submit for deterministic test assertions.
(Optional polish) Distinguish brain tour particle color (purple) from heart (pink) per spec.
(Optional) Add a 1-retry around emergentintegrations LlmChat calls in /api/tutor/chat to mask transient 502s.
(No-op for now) Preview proxy strips Cache-Control on /api/tts — no action needed unless self-hosted.
critical_code_review_comments: TTS endpoint correctly validates empty text (400), truncates >4000 chars, maps personas (school_student→nova, medical_student→sage, doctor→onyx), and returns audio/mpeg with proper MP3 header (ID3/0xFFE0 frame sync). Verified for all 3 personas.

NarratorButton import bug from iter2 is fixed in HeartExplorer.jsx (line 10). Narrator button now renders on hotspot detail panel AND inside TourPlayer. The TTS-first-then-Web-Speech-fallback flow is exercised in the Tour Player auto-play path (network panel shows /api/tts requests on tour start).

TourPlayer correctly auto-advances steps using step.duration, renders SVG polyline between hotspot coords, animates flowing particles along the polyline, and surfaces step.fact in the 'Did you know?' pill. All 5 brain tours (memory, neural-signal, motor-control, speech, emotion) and 3 heart tours load and play.

ECGMonitor renders animated SVG P-QRS-T waveform with controllable bpm (40-180 range verified), run/sound toggles wired, and WebAudio lub-dub init does not throw in headless (no console errors). All required data-testids present (ecg-monitor, ecg-bpm, ecg-toggle-run, ecg-toggle-sound).

PathwayQuiz submits to /api/quiz/submit with score=correctly_placed_count and total=items.length, which means the gamification XP math is consistent with MCQ submissions. Verified 200 response and +XP toast on submit.

Two console 401s observed on Quiz Arena first-load — looks like /api/auth/me being polled before the session cookie is attached on the very first request. Self-heals on next render; not user-visible. Worth a small follow-up to gate the call behind cookie presence.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows (ECG, Tour Player, brain 5-tour suite, pathway drag-drop, narrator button)

test_credentials: Bearer test_session_anatomia_001 / cookie session_token=test_session_anatomia_001 (user test-user-anatomia / Dr. Test / medical_student). After this run XP=520, streak=1, badges=4 — drift from the ~390 baseline due to quiz submissions during testing.
seed_data_creation: None new; reused existing test user. Each pytest run adds ~140 XP via quiz/submit tests; rerun /app/auth_testing.md cleanup+seed if a pristine baseline is needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py — class TestTTS covers POST /api/tts (3 personas, empty→400, missing→422, long-text truncation→200 streamed, default voice, cache header). TestRegression covers /api/auth/me, /api/auth/session (POST-only, GET→405), /api/user/persona, /api/tutor/chat (with 1-retry for transient 502), /api/tutor/history, /api/badges, /api/leaderboard, /api/quiz/submit. Run with `pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend: TTS network calls fire on Tour Player start (~2 calls per blood-flow tour). Brain particles currently pink — spec says purple. PathwayQuiz feedback uses tailwind classes; not query-able via [class*='green'] selectors but visually correct.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical issues to RCA. Two intermittent observations: (a) one POST /api/tutor/chat returned 502 on first attempt — retried 200; likely upstream emergentintegrations gateway hiccup, not deterministic. (b) Preview proxy rewrites Cache-Control on /api/tts to no-store; benign in this environment.
